calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant John H. Bouldt.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:51 a.m.

Eric Marquez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Samira Peacock, Associate Vendor Management Analyst for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Marquez and Ms. Peacock appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant John H. Bouldt.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed November 8, 2019, and personally served on defendant John H. Bouldt on March 5, 2021.
Default as to defendant John H. Bouldt was entered on May 3, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Monthly credit card statements.............................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant John H. Bouldt, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,821.72.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $26,821.72.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 9:56 a.m.
